_scenario: Provider A (TZ) needs to route a payment to Kenya
_description: User in Tanzania wants to send money to M-Pesa Kenya. Provider A handles the TZ side but queries the directory to find a Kenyan provider.

step_1_discovery._action: Provider A queries for a Kenya M-Pesa off-ramp

step_2_result._action: Relay returns Provider B as a matching provider

step_3_attestation_check._action: Provider A checks attestations for Provider B

step_4_health_check._action: Provider A pings Provider B's health endpoint

step_5_settlement._action: Provider A calls Provider B's settlement API to execute the Kenyan leg

step_6_complete._action: Provider A pays Provider B's Lightning invoice, Provider B delivers KES to recipient
step_6_complete.flow: User (TZ) → Provider A → Lightning → Provider B → M-Pesa Kenya → Recipient
